relatedWork: Story 4 — Team Admin reviews team access requests
taskSummary: Fix the broken Team Admin review route and limit GOV.UK render workflow commits to generated outputs for changed page templates.

problemsObserved.problem: Team Admin review route displayed a route-permission declaration error.
problemsObserved.message: This route is not available because no permission rule has been declared.

problemsObserved.problem: The GOV.UK render workflow could stage every generated index.html file after detecting rendered output changes.
problemsObserved.impact: New PRs could contain noisy unrelated generated page diffs.

residualRisks: Validation has not been run in this connector context.
The render workflow maps templates to outputs by parsing scripts/govuk/render-govuk-pages.mjs; future registration shape changes may require updating the parser.
